name: karpathy-guidelines
tagline: General behavioral guidelines nudging LLM coding agents toward simplicity, surgical edits, and verifiable success criteria.
verdict: Short, safe, principle-based coding guidance with no commands, network calls, or file mutation of its own — nothing security-relevant to flag. Solid actionability and worked examples. Only gaps: a soft rather than explicit scope caveat, and no version or changelog signal for tracking updates to the guidance itself.

highlights.summary: Only a soft caveat ('For trivial tasks, use judgment') — no explicit NOT-for exclusions or pointers to other skills.
No version field, changelog, or dated notes; only 'license: MIT' present.
